base_score_threshold.reason: Score bucket 10-12 has 26% win rate at recommended exit (n=34) — unprofitable when held to the advised exit, not just within 5 days.

max_iv.reason: High-IV options (IV≥0.70) have 1% win rate (n=466) vs 9% for IV 0.30-0.70. IV crush likely hurting returns after entry.

delta_range.reason: Delta bucket <0.25 has worst win rate (0%, n=444). Review delta_good_min / delta_good_max in config.

expiry_window.reason: DTE range 3-7d has the lowest win rate (0%). Review expiry_good_min / expiry_good_max in config.

liquidity.reason: Liquidity contributes avg -1.55 on profitable trades vs -2.29 on losses (diff=0.74, source=efficacy) — strong predictor. Raising weight 1.0 → 1.15.
liquidity.discrepancy_note: Efficacy (5-day) suggests 'raise' but actual hold outcomes suggest 'lower'. This typically means the factor is predictive short-term but the hold window is misaligned — check hold_adjustment before changing this factor weight.

expiry.reason: Expiry contributes avg -2.27 on profitable trades vs -2.41 on losses (diff=0.14, source=efficacy) — weak predictor. Lowering weight 1.0 → 0.9 to reduce noise. Corroborated by actual hold outcomes (n=4692).

strike.reason: Strike contributes avg 1.85 on profitable trades vs 1.16 on losses (diff=0.69, source=graded) — strong predictor. Raising weight 1.0 → 1.15. (graded outcomes only — insufficient efficacy data)

iv.reason: Iv contributes avg 0.41 on profitable trades vs -0.76 on losses (diff=1.18, source=efficacy) — strong predictor. Raising weight 1.0 → 1.15. Corroborated by actual hold outcomes (n=4692).

volatility.reason: Volatility contributes avg 0.43 on profitable trades vs -0.20 on losses (diff=0.63, source=graded) — strong predictor. Raising weight 1.0 → 1.15. (graded outcomes only — insufficient efficacy data)

technicals.reason: Technicals contributes avg -1.44 on profitable trades vs -1.97 on losses (diff=0.53, source=graded) — strong predictor. Raising weight 1.0 → 1.13. (graded outcomes only — insufficient efficacy data)

notes: Score threshold from graded outcomes only (insufficient efficacy data).
